race.comment: SPRING PROSPECT (7) is mixing her form and look for a sharp reversal today on the firmer track. Caught the eye first-up on the heavy track, then she never appeared comfortable on the Bathurst heavy surface with a fading sixth over 1200m. Claim helps and this trip suits. DIRTY DOES IT (4) slashing return when he motored late from back in the field to finish a narrow second over 1000m at Taree. Best form is early in the prep and expect to see him race closer to the speed. SUPIDO STAR (1) progressive filly deep into the prep. Started a solid fav when a dominant Maiden winner over this trip at Tamworth. Up in weight from the better draw and expected to go close. MISS KARIS (5) ran a better race last start when she covered ground to finish a close third over 1100m at Narromine. Best figures measure up and no shock to see her take this out.
